component.name: CoreMetrics
component.summary: Cross-platform desktop system monitor (CPU, RAM, GPU, processes)

description.p: CoreMetrics is a small C++23 system monitor built directly on raw SDL3 pixel surfaces. It shows live CPU, RAM, GPU, and per-process resource usage with an optional rolling sparklines view and an htop-style kill flow on the Processes tab.

No Qt, no Electron, no JavaScript runtime. Every widget is hand-rasterized by code in the upstream repository. Three native metrics backends (Linux /proc, macOS Mach + IOKit, Windows PDH) are selected at compile time so the same source tree builds the same UI on each platform.

screenshot.caption: System tab with CPU, RAM, GPU, and disk readouts
Processes tab with sortable table and signal menu

description.p: Initial Flatpak submission. See the upstream changelog for details.
